description: Reference table mapping IPC classification codes to broader technical fields and sectors for technology analysis.

columns.name: techn_field_nr
columns.description: Numeric code identifying the technical field.

columns.name: techn_field
columns.description: Name of the specific technical field within the sector.

columns.name: techn_sector
columns.description: Name of the broad technology sector (e.g., Electrical Engineering, Chemistry).
